metadata.title: Mario Perez | Full Stack Software Developer
metadata.description: I am a self-taught full-stack developer based in Barranquilla, Colombia and teach to build modern web apps and slick user interfaces with Python, Nuxt.js, and other web technologies
metadata.ogDescription: I am a Software developer and teach to build modern web apps and slick user interfaces with Python, Next.js, and other web technologies. We'll walk through real code examples to build web apps from start to finish.

blog.title: Blog Article Page
blog.description: A description of the my articles

about-me.intro: Hello, I'm Mario, a software developer based in Colombia. Welcome to my website!

about-me.bio: I am a self-taught software developer proficient in building applications and user interfaces using Python, ReactJS, and other software technologies. I frequenly share my thoughts on software development on my website!

technologies.title: Technologies I use
technologies.description: I exclusively use a stack of technologies to create software products.

metrics.title: Workflow and metrics
metrics.description: Check out the metrics of my programming activities.

series.label: Series
series.title: This post is part of the serie {title}

author.label: Author
author.summary: Mario Pérez is a software developer who is based in Colombia. He occasionally writes articles about how to build modern web applications using Python, Next.js, and other web tech. In his free time, he stays active by jogging, going to the gym, or cycling.

share.label: Share
share.desc: Are you interested in helping spread valuable information? Then, don't keep this article to yourself! Share it on your social networks and help many people benefit from it. Remember, your share can make a difference!

posts.pagination: Showing {start, number} to {middle, number} out of a total of {end, plural, =1 {1 result} other {# results}}

sponsor.label: Become a sponsor
sponsor.desc: If you have found any of my contributions to this website helpful, I would be extremely grateful if you could support me.

newsletter.desc: Subscribe to our newsletter and stay updated on the latest developments.
